nasb.text: ‘As for the promise which I made you when you came out of Egypt, My Spirit is abiding in your midst; do not fear!’

esv.text: according to the covenant that I made with you when you came out of Egypt. My Spirit remains in your midst. Fear not.

cnv.text: 這就是你們從埃及出來的時候，我與你們立約的話。現在我的靈住在你們中間；你們不要懼怕。”

ccb.text: 这是你们离开埃及时我对你们的应许。不要惧怕，我的灵仍住在你们当中。
